objectives: Filter evidence supplied to each agent by declared role scope
Separate invocation purpose from experiment variant
Detect role-scope violations independently of schema validation
Add semantic validation for specialist claims and warnings
Preserve existing live-client and artifact behavior

architectural_decisions.title: Agent Evidence Scope and Semantic Validation

commands_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_role_scope_policy.py tests/test_qwen_live_client.py tests/test_qwen_live_cli.py tests/test_qwen_live_integration.py

commands_run.result: offline comparison generated without live calls

commands_run.command: PYTHONPATH=src python -m project_recovery_council live-agent --agent ScheduleExpert --model qwen-plus

known_limitations: Prior live artifacts are not retroactively modified
Role phrase detection may need refinement as more real outputs are observed
